created_for: GS LinkOps AI resource database building
language_strategy: English-first source records and technical database fields.

records.name: NASA Near Earth / Near Space Network public station capability matrix
useful_for: commercial and institutional station role distinction
partner station mapping for KSAT, SSC, SANSA and NASA-owned sites
records.confidence_level: Medium. Public matrix is valuable for schema and reference coverage; operational values should be verified against NASA SCaN / NSN official service documentation before commercial use.
records.next_action: Use as a schema driver for station_capability rows, especially fields for supported_bands_public, antenna_diameter_m_public, operator and partner_operator. Cross-check with NASA SCaN user guides later.

records.name: The Space above the Sky: Uniting Global-Scale Ground Station as a Service for Efficient Orbital Data Processing
useful_for: joint communication and cloud-computing resource scheduling
real-time matching using bipartite graph and Hungarian algorithm
robustness against weather and limited station availability
records.confidence_level: Medium-high for matching-logic and system-design extraction because it is a recent research paper; not an operator capability sheet and not evidence of actual commercial availability.
records.next_action: Add cost_latency_score, provider_federation_flag and weather_risk_score to the future AI matching engine. Keep separate from verified station capability records.

records.name: Scalable Ground Station Selection for Large LEO Constellations
useful_for: benchmarking against Capella, ICEYE and Planet-style constellation sizes
records.confidence_level: Medium-high for algorithmic design and field extraction; not a source for station ownership, pricing or exact station configurations.
records.next_action: Use this to design the station_candidate_ranking table and to distinguish single-mission matching from constellation-scale planning.

records.name: ESA ESTRACK Kourou Station public capability reference
useful_for: launch and early orbit phase support reference
S-band and X-band receive capability fields
tracking telemetry telecommand and radiometric measurement vocabulary
records.confidence_level: Medium. Useful public station-level capability reference; verify with official ESA station page before operational or commercial use.
records.next_action: Create station-specific ESTRACK records rather than only a network-level record; use Kourou as the first LEOP-capable station example.

records.name: ESA ESTRACK Santa Maria Island Station public capability reference
useful_for: Atlantic coverage and launch trajectory support reference
records.confidence_level: Medium. Public technical ranges are useful for schema validation; official ESA documents should be used before final engineering use.
records.next_action: Add frequency range fields to station_capability table, not only generic band names.

records.name: Goldstone Deep Space Communications Complex public antenna and band reference
useful_for: station complex with multiple antenna assets model
database_targets: Deep Space Ground Network Reference Library
records.confidence_level: Medium. Public reference is valuable for taxonomy and antenna-class fields; official NASA/JPL pages are required for authoritative current status.
records.next_action: Use as a station_complex pattern: one complex contains many antenna assets with independent size, band and status fields.

next_batch_targets: NASA SCaN official Near Space Network user guide and service pages
Official ESA Kourou and Santa Maria station pages
Leaf Space official technical pages beyond public summaries
SatNOGS DB API documentation and transmitter schema
CCSDS CFDP and SLE service-specific Blue Books
